testcase.name: mypy-py3_13-win32
testcase.failure: src\geoninja_dp\dp_rock_properties.py:5: error: Library stubs not installed for "yaml" [import-untyped] src\geoninja_dp\dp_hydr_grad.py:5: error: Skipping analyzing "rasterio": module is installed, but missing library stubs or py.typed marker [import-untyped] src\geoninja_dp\dp_hydr_grad.py:6: error: Library stubs not installed for "yaml" [import-untyped] src\geoninja_dp\dp_hydr_grad.py:104: error: Item "None" of "Any | None" has no attribute "values" [union-attr] src\geoninja_dp\dp_glim.py:6: error: Skipping analyzing "rasterio": module is installed, but missing library stubs or py.typed marker [import-untyped] src\geoninja_dp\dp_glim.py:8: error: Library stubs not installed for "yaml" [import-untyped] src\geoninja_dp\dp_glim.py:9: error: Skipping analyzing "rasterio.transform": module is installed, but missing library stubs or py.typed marker [import-untyped] src\geoninja_dp\dp_glhymps.py:5: error: Library stubs not installed for "geopandas" [import-untyped] src\geoninja_dp\dp_glhymps.py:5: note: Hint: "python3 -m pip install types-geopandas" src\geoninja_dp\dp_glhymps.py:5: note: (or run "mypy --install-types" to install all missing stub packages) src\geoninja_dp\dp_glhymps.py:5: note: See https://mypy.readthedocs.io/en/stable/running_mypy.html#missing-imports src\geoninja_dp\dp_glhymps.py:8: error: Library stubs not installed for "yaml" [import-untyped] src\geoninja_dp\dp_glhymps.py:8: note: Hint: "python3 -m pip install types-PyYAML" src\geoninja_dp\dp_glhymps.py:10: error: Library stubs not installed for "tqdm" [import-untyped] src\geoninja_dp\dp_glhymps.py:10: note: Hint: "python3 -m pip install types-tqdm" src\geoninja_dp\dp_glhymps.py:147: error: Missing return statement [return]
